prompt.content:
Make the following changes to the RAMBUS vs SLAB analysis:
1.	Update the % cash consideration to 15%
2.	Update the % SG&A Synergies to 50%
3.	Update the Advisory Fees to 0.5%
4.	In the Pro Forma Expected Combined Valuation calculation, replace the Bidder’s EV/EBITDA multiple with a weighted average of the EV/EBITDA multiples for RMBS and SLAB (Similar to the way the weighted average EV/EBITDA Multiple has been calculated in the MTSI and ONTO Merger analysis). However, for SLAB, instead of using its implied EV/EBITDA, use the average EV/TTM EBITDA multiple of the following peer group: ADI, MCHP, and NXPI.
5.	For each peer, use their enterprise value and trailing twelve months (TTM) EBITDA as reported in the most recent quarter available as of January 3, 2026.
6.	Output to 2 decimal places
a.	% Value Accretion /(Dilution) to RMBS Shareholders
b.	 % Value Accretion /(Dilution) to SLAB Shareholders

rubrics.name: States the % Value Accretion /(Dilution) to RMBS Shareholders is -30.96%... (ver_a1e864ef36694f03b9242f2795b0043f)
